TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sqoyaw ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 557 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 73%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sqoyaw hya' ga Tabuk. trang msbehuy ru ungat tuqi lga, mutu nanak sakuro qu stman na qalang. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. tuqi' na qsya' blaq iyal puqing qsya' na qasa hiya'. cyux ini' s'ragi ana cikuy. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh blaq iyal 'uraw na rhzyal qani hiya'. m'rkyas iyal pm'yan nasi. m'rkyas iyal pm'yan ruma'. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax kwara' qalang. kya cingay tuqi' hkngyan. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. maki' squ b'bu' na rgyax ga, baqun tmnga' kwara' rgrgyax. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. 'bagan tngan kwara' qu rgyax ga, mtasiq kwara' qu abaw nya'. tuqi' na qsya' mtasaw balay qu llyung na qalang. spyangan na pinbahu qqzimux, nasi.
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa taβuk. traŋ ms~ɕβeħuj ru uŋat tuqi lɣa, mutu nanak s~ɕakuro qu s~ɕtman na qalaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ βlaq ijal puqiŋ qs~ɕjaʔ na qas~ɕa ħijaʔ. ʦ~ʨjux iniʔ s~ɕʔraɣi ana ʦ~ʨikuj. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ βlaq ijal ʔuraw na rħzjal qani ħijaʔ. mʔrkjas~ɕ ijal pmʔjan nas~ɕi. mʔrkjas~ɕ ijal pmʔjan rumaʔ. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax kwaraʔ qalaŋ. kja ʦ~ʨiŋaj tuqiʔ ħkŋjan. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. makiʔ s~ɕqu βʔβuʔ na rɣjax ɣa, βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrɣjax. qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. ʔβaɣan tŋan kwaraʔ qu rɣjax ɣa, mtas~ɕiq kwaraʔ qu aβaw njaʔ. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ mtas~ɕaw βalaj qu lljuŋ na qalaŋ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu qqzimux, nas~ɕi.
S.FORM: alang Sqoyaw ga niya mki sku Taycyo Si atu Wahe'i go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 233 buwan, 699 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 80% kyan ku 557 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 20% kyan ku 142 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 73%, Amis 1%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 3%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sqoyaw hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sqoyaw hya' ga Tabuk. trang msbehuy ru ungat tuqi lga, mutu nanak sakuro qu stman na qalang. rekisi kayal qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. tuqi' na qsya' blaq iyal puqing qsya' na qasa hiya'. cyux ini' s'ragi ana cikuy. kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh blaq iyal 'uraw na rhzyal qani hiya'. m'rkyas iyal pm'yan nasi. m'rkyas iyal pm'yan ruma'. tuqi qsya' ki rrhzyal giway rgrgyax kwara' qalang. kya cingay tuqi' hkngyan. squliq ka minkahul te hugal ga, blaq nha' mwah rgyax. maki' squ b'bu' na rgyax ga, baqun tmnga' kwara' rgrgyax. qmisan lga, hzyaq balay maki' te rgyax hiya'. 'bagan tngan kwara' qu rgyax ga, mtasiq kwara' qu abaw nya'. tuqi' na qsya' mtasaw balay qu llyung na qalang. spyangan na pinbahu qqzimux, nasi.
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕqojaw ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajʦ~ʨjo s~ɕi atu waħeʔi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕqojaw ħjaʔ ɣa taβuk. traŋ ms~ɕβeħuj ru uŋat tuqi lɣa, mutu nanak s~ɕakuro qu s~ɕtman na qalaŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ βlaq ijal puqiŋ qs~ɕjaʔ na qas~ɕa ħijaʔ. ʦ~ʨjux iniʔ s~ɕʔraɣi ana ʦ~ʨikuj. kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ βlaq ijal ʔuraw na rħzjal qani ħijaʔ. mʔrkjas~ɕ ijal pmʔjan nas~ɕi. mʔrkjas~ɕ ijal pmʔjan rumaʔ. tuqi qs~ɕjaʔ ki rrħzjal ɣiwaj rɣrɣjax kwaraʔ qalaŋ. kja ʦ~ʨiŋaj tuqiʔ ħkŋjan. s~ɕquliq ka minkaħul te ħuɣal ɣa, βlaq nħaʔ mwaħ rɣjax. makiʔ s~ɕqu βʔβuʔ na rɣjax ɣa, βaqun tmŋaʔ kwaraʔ rɣrɣjax. qmis~ɕan lɣa, ħzjaq βalaj makiʔ te rɣjax ħijaʔ. ʔβaɣan tŋan kwaraʔ qu rɣjax ɣa, mtas~ɕiq kwaraʔ qu aβaw njaʔ. tuqiʔ na qs~ɕjaʔ mtas~ɕaw βalaj qu lljuŋ na qalaŋ. s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu qqzimux, nas~ɕi.
